overview: gothicgarden is an anonymous confessions platform for investment mistakes and financial stories. Users share a personal link to collect anonymous submissions, which appear as cards on a public scrollable feed with reactions, comments, category filtering, and social sharing.
features: Reactions on confession cards (relatable, crazy, sad, funny)
Confession of the Day based on most reactions
Expanded categories: crypto, stocks, real estate, forex, money, relationships, school, dark secrets, investing losses
